creator: joe@zircon.seattle.wa.us
text:
IT DOES NOT WORK.

I just installed 0.12 and the player still does not work.

I did protupgrade -fR --batch rhythmbox to recompile everything.  When I 
start it, it tries to start playing the song I selected and immediately 
crashes.  Every once in a while, it manages to play one or two songs, 
but it eventually crashes.  I believe it is while either reading or 
writing the song information file to mark the song as played or to 
prepare to play the song.

Can you give me exact help on how to recompile with enought debug 
information to allow tracing?  This program has an awful lot of shared 
libraries...

/Joe
